lines.english: Hello, may I ask, is Teacher Chang in?
This is she. Who are you?
Teacher, hello. I am Li You.
Teacher, do you have time this afternoon? I would like to ask you a few questions.
I'm sorry, I have a meeting this afternoon.
Tomorrow morning I have two classes, and at three in the afternoon I have to give an exam to the second-year class.
When will you have free time?
I won't have free time until after four o'clock tomorrow.
If it's convenient for you, I'll go to your office at 4:30, is that okay?
4:30, no problem. I'll wait for you in my office.

example_sentence.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.

example_sentence.cn: 我昨天很忙，没给妈妈打电话。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ zuótiān hěn máng, méi gěi māma dǎ diànhuà.
example_sentence.en: I was very busy yesterday. I didn't call my mother.

example_sentence.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.

vocabulary.definition: to be present, to be at (a place)

example_sentence.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example_sentence.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

example_sentence.py: Wǒ wèn tā yí ge wèntí

vocabulary.definition: will, to be going to, to want to, to have a desire to [See Grammar 2.]

example_sentence.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。

example_sentence.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

example_sentence.cn: 明天我不去小白家玩儿,我要开会。
example_sentence.py: Míngtiān wǒ bú qù Xiǎo Bái jiā wánr, wǒ yào kāi huì.
example_sentence.en: I'm not going to visit Little Bai tomorrow. I am going to a meeting.

vocabulary.definition: to open, to hold (a meeting, party, etc.)

database_items.original_pinyin: wèi qǐngwèn cháng lǎoshī zài ma
standard_answers: Hello, may I ask, is Teacher Chang in?

database_items.original_text: 老师,今天下午您有时间吗？我想问您几个问题。
database_items.original_pinyin: lǎo shī jīn tiān xià wǔ nín yǒu shí jiān ma wǒ xiǎng wèn nín jǐ ge wèn tí
standard_answers: Teacher, do you have time this afternoon? I would like to ask you a few questions.

database_items.original_text: 明天上午我有两节课,下午三点要给二年级考试。
database_items.original_pinyin: míng tiān shàng wǔ wǒ yǒu liǎng jié kè xià wǔ sān diǎn yào gěi èr nián jí kǎo shì
standard_answers: Tomorrow morning I have two classes, and at three in the afternoon I have to give an exam to the second-year class.

database_items.original_text: 要是您方便,四点半我到您的办公室去,行吗？
database_items.original_pinyin: yàoshi nín fāngbiàn sì diǎn bàn wǒ dào nín de bàngōngshì qù xíng ma
standard_answers: If it's convenient for you, I'll go to your office at 4:30, is that okay?

database_items.original_text: This is she. Who are you?
I'm sorry, I have a meeting this afternoon.
standard_answers: 对不起,今天下午我要开会。

database_items.original_text: When will you have free time?
If a classmate invites you to see a movie, what movie would you like to see?
standard_answers: 要是同学请你看电影，你想看什么电影？

video_global_config.visual_style: A warm and inviting 3D Pixar animation style, with soft lighting and detailed textures, suitable for an educational setting. The color palette is bright and friendly.

character_definitions.name: 常老师
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A kind-faced Chinese woman in her early 40s, with shoulder-length dark hair neatly tied back. She wears stylish, thin-rimmed glasses, a light blue blouse, and has a warm, approachable smile. She appears professional yet gentle.

character_definitions.name: 李友
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A young Chinese woman in her early 20s, with bright, curious eyes and long black hair worn in a casual ponytail. She is dressed in a university-style sweatshirt and jeans, looking earnest and respectful.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 分镜画面：采用分屏模式。左边是学生李友在宿舍里，表情略带紧张地打电话。右边是常老师在她温馨的书房办公室里，微笑着接起电话。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Split screen, 3D Pixar animation style. Left side: a young Asian female student (Li You) in a bright, slightly messy dorm room, holding a smartphone to her ear with a hopeful and slightly nervous expression. Right side: a kind-faced middle-aged Asian female teacher (Teacher Chang) in a well-organized, warm-toned office filled with books, answering her desk phone with a gentle smile. Cinematic, soft lighting.

voice_over.content: 喂, 请问, 常老师在吗？
voice_over.pinyin: wèi, qǐngwèn, cháng lǎoshī zài ma?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 分镜画面：镜头聚焦在常老师这边。她带着歉意的表情解释。一个动态的日历图标出现在她旁边，上面清晰地标出“今天下午：开会”和“明天上午：两节课，下午三点：考试”。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Medium shot of Teacher Chang in her office, 3D Pixar style. She has an apologetic expression. A stylized, semi-transparent calendar graphic animates into the frame next to her, highlighting 'This Afternoon: Meeting' and 'Tomorrow: 2 Classes (AM), 3 PM Exam (PM)'. She gestures towards the calendar as she speaks. Soft, focused lighting.

voice_over.content: 对不起, 今天下午我要开会。明天上午我有两节课, 下午三点要给二年级考试。
voice_over.pinyin: duìbuqǐ, jīntiān xiàwǔ wǒ yào kāihuì. míngtiān shàngwǔ wǒ yǒu liǎng jié kè, xiàwǔ sān diǎn yào gěi èr niánjí kǎoshì.

screen_overlay.main_text: 开会 (kāi huì) / 考试 (kǎo shì)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to have a meeting / to have an exam

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 分镜画面：常老师的表情由思索变为微笑。她旁边的日历上，“明天四点以后”的时间段被绿色高亮，并闪烁了一下，表示有空。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Close-up on Teacher Chang's face, 3D Pixar style. Her expression changes from thoughtful to a pleasant smile. The animated calendar next to her highlights a time slot 'Tomorrow, after 4:00 PM' in bright green, with a subtle sparkling effect to indicate availability. The focus is on her reassuring expression. Warm, inviting light.

voice_over.content: 明天四点以后才有空儿。
voice_over.pinyin: míngtiān sì diǎn yǐhòu cái yǒu kòngr.

screen_overlay.main_text: ...以后才有空儿 (...yǐhòu cái yǒu kòngr)
screen_overlay.sub_text: to not have free time until after...

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 分镜画面：再次回到分屏。左边的李友表情变得轻松愉快，点头同意。右边的常老师也微笑着点头。两人中间浮现出常老师办公室门的图像，门牌上写着“常老师”，旁边有一个时钟指向“4:30”。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Return to split screen, 3D Pixar style. Left: Li You looks relieved and happy, nodding into her phone. Right: Teacher Chang nods back with a warm, welcoming smile. In the center of the split screen, a graphic of an office door with a nameplate '常老师' and a clock showing '4:30' materializes. The overall mood is positive and successful.

voice_over.content: 要是您方便, 四点半我到您的办公室去, 行吗？
voice_over.pinyin: yàoshi nín fāngbiàn, sì diǎn bàn wǒ dào nín de bàngōngshì qù, xíng ma?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 分镜画面：分屏消失，全屏展示常老师。她挂上电话，然后对着镜头（代表李友）露出一个鼓励和欢迎的微笑，仿佛在说“办公室见”。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Full screen shot of Teacher Chang in her office, 3D Pixar style. She is hanging up her phone and looks directly at the camera with a warm, encouraging smile and gives a slight, friendly nod. The background is softly blurred, focusing on her kind expression. The scene is bathed in warm, late-afternoon light coming from a window.

voice_over.content: 没问题。我在办公室等你。
voice_over.pinyin: méi wèntí. wǒ zài bàngōngshì děng nǐ.
